title: TOURISM LEVY Education Instagram Post (6)
text:
What’s Changing?
ENVIRONMENTAL
TOURISM
SUSTAINABILITY
LEVY
UPDATE EFFECTIVE
1 JANUARY 2026
SMALL ACCOMMODATIONS ESTABLISMENT (1–24 ROOMS)
WILL NO LONGER BE REQURIED TO COLLECT AND PAY THE LEVY
TO SRC
S.I. 90 of 2025 - Environment Protection (Tourism
Environmental Sustainability Levy) (Amendment)
Regulations, 2025

Who Shall Still Collect the Levy?
TOURISM LEVY
RATES
Medium accommodation establishments (24–50 rooms): SCR 75
Large accommodation establishments (51+ rooms): SCR 100
Yachts & Island Resorts: SCR 100
Levy will remain applicable per person, per night
MEDIUM AND LARGE ACCOMMODATION
ESTABLISHMENTS, YACHTS, AND ISLAND RESORTS
WILL CONTINUE TO COLLECT THE TOURISM
ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY LEVY AT
AFOREMENTIONED RATES.

Who’s exempted ?
LEVY
EXEMPTIONS
The levy is NOT applicable to:
Seychellois citizens
Resident persons
Airline & yacht crew
• Children aged 12 years & below

Important Notice for Taxpayers
LEVY FILING
REMINDER &
PAYMENT
Must be submitted by using the revised dedicated return
form
Must be filed and payed on or before the 21st of the
following applicable month
Late filing and payment of levy may result in penalties
TOURISM ACCOMMODATION ESTABLISHMENTS
REQUIRED TO COLLECT THE LEVY MUST FILE THEIR
RETURN AND PAY ON OR BEFORE THE 21ST OF THE
FOLLOWING APPLICABLE MONTH.

Need Help? Contact SRC
WE’RE HERE
TO HELP
Email: advisory.center@src.gov.sc
Phone: 429 3737
Forms available at SRC offices & online
FOR GUIDANCE OR CLARIFICATION ON THE TOURISM
ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY LEVY, CONTACT
THE SEYCHELLES REVENUE COMMISSION ADVISORY
OFFICE

title: VAT Registration Form
text:
SEYCHELLES REVENUE COMMISSION
(DOMESTIC TAX DIVISION)
VAT REGISTRATION FORM
(VAT Act, 2010)
BUSINESS NAME: .........................................................................................................................................
TAX IDENTIFICATION NUMBER (TIN): .................................................................................................................
BUSINESS ADDRESS: ..............................................................................................................................
TELEPHONE NUMBER: ..........................................................................................................................
EMAIL: ......................................................................................................................................................
Please answer the following questions by ticking in the appropriate box.
1. Does your business make taxable supplies?
YES NO
2. Confirm if your annual sales turnover is equal to or exceeds the VAT threshold of SR 2 million?YES
NO
3. Confirm if you expect the annual sales turnover of your business to exceed the VAT threshold of SR 2 million
in a year?
YES NO
4. If your turnover is below the threshold of SR2 million, do you wish to opt for voluntary registration for VAT?
YES NO
It is your obligation as a taxpayer to provide information that is requested by the Seychelles Revenue
Commission. If you have made any error when completing this form, visit us on the 3rd Floor Maison Collet,
Victoria or call us on telephone 4293741/2/3, or e-mail us on Advisory.center@src.gov.sc for another copy or
download a copy of the form from our website (www.src.gov.sc).
I, ........................................................................................................................, hereby declare that the above information
on this form is true and correct.
Sign: ................................................................................... Date: ...................................................................................
